case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. LEE F TONER et al

docket_entries.description: AFTER HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-08-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S) OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE AUG-29-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR OCT-08-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
